name: Psychologist
overview: Due to negative feedback to a public service announcement on suicide prevention that she created, psychologist He Dun experiences a blow to her career. To cheer up, she meets her best friend at a restaurant where she runs into Qian Kai Yi. He is now hosting a radio program dealing with emotional issues. At his insistence, He Dun agrees to be his collaborator and co-host. As the show gains listenership He Dun's counseling clinic becomes equally busy.

trailers.title: ENGSUB预告：有“超能力”？杨紫井柏然新剧预告燃炸首发 |  【女心理师 Psychologist】| 杨紫/井柏然/王嘉/菅纫姿/黄觉/倪萍/张钧甯/马苏/杨童舒 | 悬疑剧 | 优酷YOUKU
